prose:
Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on pyridine (11 atoms: N, C×5, H×5) at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (chemkit tier 'standard'), with density fitting (RI approximation), implemented in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken from the user-supplied pyridine.xyz without re-optimization (single-point). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok / trustworthy: true.

Key results:
- HOMO (index 20): −7.2525992 eV
- LUMO (index 21): −1.112786 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 6.1398131 eV (headline value)
- Vertical IP (Koopmans): 7.2526 eV
- Vertical EA (Koopmans): 1.1128 eV
- Total electronic energy: −248.3782 Hartree (−6758.7152 eV)

Method: B3LYP/def2-TZVP // input geometry (no DFT geometry relaxation performed).
